privileged_info_summary: Task creates a purchase invoice in Ekylibre (confirmed real open-source farm management system) with reference number INV-2024-0587 from supplier 'Coopérative Agricole du Poitou' (confirmed real French agricultural cooperative) dated 2024-03-15. Invoice contains 2 line items: 500 units of seed/grain at €0.35/unit (€175) and 2000 units of fertilizer at €0.42/unit (€840), totaling €1,015. Amount range [900.0-1150.0] is mathematically correct for this specification.
